metadata.title: UK Parliament Cookie Policy - UK Parliament
metadata.author: download (3)

.NET
Name:
ARRAffinitySameSite
Purpose:
Used by Azure App Service to route requests to the correct application instance behind a load balancer (known as sticky sessions)
Expires:
When user exits browser

Purpose:
Used by Azure App Service to route requests to the correct application instance behind a load balancer

Purpose:
Used by Microsoft Application Insights, an anonymous unique ID to identify a user's session

Purpose:
Used by Microsoft Application Insights, an anonymous unique ID to track returning users
Expires:

_epets_session
Purpose:
This keeps your information secure while you use the petitions service
Expires:
When you close your browser
Name:
signed_tokens
Purpose:
Randomly generated references used to identify what links you’ve clicked to verify your email address
Expires:
When you close your browser
Parliamentary Careers website
request_token: This may be set for users visiting *.wcn.co.uk domain.
wcn_status: This may be set for users visiting *.wcn.co.uk domain.
wcn_session: This may be set for users visiting *.tal.net domain. Name:
protectCaptcha
Purpose:
Proves that you have completed a challenge in your browser. This helps to differentiate real users from automated bots or malicious traffic
Expires:
after 24 hours
By understanding how people use the Parliament website, we can improve the navigation and content to make the site better and easier to use. We will continue to update this list, but there may be some delay at times. Google Analytics
We use Google Analytics to gather data on the number of people accessing our site, where they are accessing from, what pages they visit, and what technology they are using. Google Analytics cannot identify you personally but does allow us to understand our users as a group. For example, by recording what browsers are being used. Name:
_ga
Purpose:
Allows us to understand how users interact with our websites
Expires:
2 years
Name:
_ga_<ID number>
Purpose:
Allows us to understand how users interact with our websites
Expires:
2 years
Name:
_gid
Purpose:
Allows us to understand how users interact with our websites
Expires:
24 hours
Hotjar
Name:
_hjDonePolls
Purpose:
Expires:
One year

Purpose:
Expires:
One year

Purpose:

Purpose:
Expires:
One year

_hjIncludedInSample
Purpose:
Expires:
One year
Name:
_hjSessionUser<site_id>
Purpose:
Persists the
Hotjar User ID
which is unique to that site. Ensures data from subsequent visits to the same site are attributed to the same user ID. Expires:
One year
Name:
hjSession{site_id}
Purpose:
Holds current session data.

chunks.text: Purpose: Expires: One year Name: _hjIncludedInSample Purpose: Expires: One year Name: _hjSessionUser<site_id> Purpose: Persists the Hotjar User ID which is unique to that site. Ensures data from subsequent visits to the same site are attributed to the same user ID. Expires: One year Name: hjSession{site_id} Purpose: Holds current session data. Ensures subsequent requests in the session window are attributed to the same session Expires: 30 minutes duration, extended on user activity Name: _hjHasCachedUserAttributes Purpose: Enables us to know whether the data set in _hjUserAttributes is up to date or not Expires: After session finished Name: _hjUserAttributesHash Purpose: Enables us to know when any User Attribute has changed and needs to be updated Expires: 2 minutes duration, extended every 30 seconds Name: hjViewportId Purpose: Stores user viewport details such as size and dimensions Expires: After session finished Name: hjActiveViewportIds Purpose: Stores an expirationTimestamp that is used to validate active viewports on script initialization Expires: After session finished Shopify See Tickets . Vualto Name: Typical Content: Expiry: Six months Mailchimp Name: _mcid Typical Content: To identify unique users for MailChimp services Expiry: 1 year Race Against Chime Gauges Name: _gauges_unique, _gauges_unique_day, _gauges_unique_hour, _gauges_unique_month, _gauges_unique_year Purpose: To calculate billing when ordering printed resources Expires: After 1 month We use tracking tags to collect information about your browsing habits on our site and measure performance of our marketing activity. This enables us to: make advertising, both on this site and other websites you subsequently visit, relevant to you and your interests limit the number of times those adverts are served to you track responses to our events learn more about the demographics of people engaging with our online advertising understand and optimise the effectiveness of our online advertising AdWords - Conversion tracker: This tag fires when an online order is completed Google Signals If you have enabled personalisation on your Google account, Google will be able to prepare data models and reports on website habits. These can show information such as what type of device you have clicked on an advertisement through or made a purchase with. We use Google Signals to better understand how users engage with our sites on different devices. This also helps us to understand the demographics and interests for those users who have accepted advertising personalisation. When it is activated, Google Signals enables remarketing (also known as retargeting) campaigns to work across a person's multiple devices. Users can opt-out of Google Analytics Advertising Features through: Google Ads Settings Google Analtyics Opt-Out Browser Add-on NAI’s consumer opt-out Alternatively, you may wish to visit Google Chrome Microsoft Edge Mozilla Firefox Opera To opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics across all websites, visit http://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout . To opt-out of third-parties collecting any data on your interaction on our website, please refer to their websites for further information. Last updated August 2025.
chunks.display_text: Ensures subsequent requests in the session window are attributed to the same session Expires: 30 minutes duration, extended on user activity Name: _hjHasCachedUserAttributes Purpose: Enables us to know whether the data set in _hjUserAttributes is up to date or not Expires: After session finished Name: _hjUserAttributesHash Purpose: Enables us to know when any User Attribute has changed and needs to be updated Expires: 2 minutes duration, extended every 30 seconds Name: hjViewportId Purpose: Stores user viewport details such as size and dimensions Expires: After session finished Name: hjActiveViewportIds Purpose: Stores an expirationTimestamp that is used to validate active viewports on script initialization Expires: After session finished Shopify See Tickets . Vualto Name: Typical Content: Expiry: Six months Mailchimp Name: _mcid Typical Content: To identify unique users for MailChimp services Expiry: 1 year Race Against Chime Gauges Name: _gauges_unique, _gauges_unique_day, _gauges_unique_hour, _gauges_unique_month, _gauges_unique_year Purpose: To calculate billing when ordering printed resources Expires: After 1 month We use tracking tags to collect information about your browsing habits on our site and measure performance of our marketing activity. This enables us to: make advertising, both on this site and other websites you subsequently visit, relevant to you and your interests limit the number of times those adverts are served to you track responses to our events learn more about the demographics of people engaging with our online advertising understand and optimise the effectiveness of our online advertising AdWords - Conversion tracker: This tag fires when an online order is completed Google Signals If you have enabled personalisation on your Google account, Google will be able to prepare data models and reports on website habits. These can show information such as what type of device you have clicked on an advertisement through or made a purchase with. We use Google Signals to better understand how users engage with our sites on different devices. This also helps us to understand the demographics and interests for those users who have accepted advertising personalisation. When it is activated, Google Signals enables remarketing (also known as retargeting) campaigns to work across a person's multiple devices. Users can opt-out of Google Analytics Advertising Features through: Google Ads Settings Google Analtyics Opt-Out Browser Add-on NAI’s consumer opt-out Alternatively, you may wish to visit Google Chrome Microsoft Edge Mozilla Firefox Opera To opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics across all websites, visit http://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout . To opt-out of third-parties collecting any data on your interaction on our website, please refer to their websites for further information. Last updated August 2025.
